mark: Sustained-Release Formulation for Multi-Indication Generic Analgesics
notes:
1. Current Context & Status  
As of today, SKM LLC (SKM Life Sciences & Technology), under parent First Holding Group, holds an active patent in Saudi Arabia for a "Sustained-Release Formulation for Multi-Indication Generic Analgesics" (Patent No. TEST-PAT-KSA-2024-0011). The patent, classified under A61K 9/22, A61K 31/165, and A61P 29/00, was filed on 2024-01-10, registered on 2024-08-09, and has a renewal date of 2044-08-09. The recorded agent is Sara Mohamad.

2. Operational Impact  
The active status of Patent No. TEST-PAT-KSA-2024-0011 enables exclusive use/monetisation of the covered formulation in Saudi Arabia until at least 2044-08-09. No immediate renewals or regulatory deadlines are imminent. However, without further financial or commercialisation data, operational and compliance implications are limited to maintaining patent validity within the stated period. Insufficient data — financial exposure, licensing arrangements, or infringement risks are not provided.

3. Next Steps — Business Ops & C-Level  
a) Business Operations: Confirm proper maintenance and accurate documentation of the patent, ensuring all compliance records tied to TEST-PAT-KSA-2024-0011 are up to date before the next significant date of 2044-08-09 (renewal date).  
b) C-Level / Board: Recommend reviewing intellectual property strategy and risk exposure related to this asset prior to 2025 Q1, given its strategic value and the newness of registration (2024-08-09), and formally notify the board of successful registration in Saudi Arabia.
